assumptions: Total molding time (T_molding) and total assembly time (T_assembly) were not provided in the CSV data; these are assumed as constants in the script and should be updated with actual business values.
full_script:
import pandas as pd

# Load data
df = pd.read_csv('production_data.csv')

# 1. Define Sets
# I: Set of all products
I = df['Product_SKU'].unique().tolist()

# 2. Define Parameters
# p_i: Sale price per unit of product i
p = dict(zip(df['Product_SKU'], df['Sale_Price_Per_Unit']))

# c_i: Material cost per unit of product i
c = dict(zip(df['Product_SKU'], df['Material_Cost_Per_Unit']))

# m_i: Molding time required per unit of product i
m = dict(zip(df['Product_SKU'], df['Molding_Mins_Req']))

# a_i: Assembly time required per unit of product i
a = dict(zip(df['Product_SKU'], df['Assembly_Mins_Req']))

# Cap_max,i: Maximum market capacity for product i
cap_max = dict(zip(df['Product_SKU'], df['Max_Market_Capacity']))

# Global capacities (Constants not found in CSV, defined as assumptions)
T_molding = 10000  # Total available molding time
T_assembly = 10000 # Total available assembly time

# Verify data structures
print(f"Set I: {I}")
print(f"Parameter p (first 5): {list(p.items())[:5]}")
print(f"T_molding: {T_molding}")
print(f"T_assembly: {T_assembly}")
mapping_explanation: The set I (products) is derived from the 'Product_SKU' column.
The sale price p_i is mapped from the 'Sale_Price_Per_Unit' column.
The material cost c_i is mapped from the 'Material_Cost_Per_Unit' column.
The molding time m_i is mapped from the 'Molding_Mins_Req' column.
The assembly time a_i is mapped from the 'Assembly_Mins_Req' column.
The market capacity Cap_max,i is mapped from the 'Max_Market_Capacity' column.
T_molding and T_assembly are scalar constants reflecting total resource availability.

parameters.description: Sale price per unit of product i
Material cost per unit of product i
Molding time required per unit of product i
Assembly time required per unit of product i
Maximum market capacity for product i

preprocessing_steps: Load the CSV file into a pandas DataFrame.
Extract unique values from 'Product_SKU' to define the product set I.
Create dictionaries for product-specific parameters (p_i, c_i, m_i, a_i, Cap_max,i) using 'Product_SKU' as the key.
Define the global resource constants T_molding and T_assembly as scalars.
